content:
💡 Crucix | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide individuals with a comprehensive, real-time, and locally-run intelligence dashboard and assistant for monitoring global events and data.
✨ Key Features: • Aggregates data from 27 OSINT sources • Real-time dashboard visualization • LLM integration for interactive assistance • Multi-tier alerts to Telegram and Discord
📖 Summary: Crucix is a personal intelligence agent that aggregates data from 27 open-source intelligence feeds, including satellite imagery, flight tracking, and economic indicators. It presents this information on a self-contained dashboard and can be integrated with LLMs to provide real-time alerts and respond to commands, acting as a personal analyst without cloud reliance.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
